stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: worker_pool_test and the run_command jobs tests pass; full suite green

stages.name: property_tests
stages.evidence: deterministic-output properties: worker count does not change report mutant order/ids/statuses; the index-to-result mapping is processed exactly once and is independent of scheduling; effectiveJobs clamps to [1, min(count, 64)]; distinct mutants get distinct content-addressed workspaces with nested local .zig-cache and zig-out

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: full self-mutation dogfood of zentinel's own runner is gated to the Phase 5 stages (task 085); the worker pool is fixture- and unit-tested and its output is a deterministic function of the serial run, which the property tests assert

stages.name: final_artifact_audit
stages.evidence: task-control Markdown and JSON agree; completion evidence lists concrete changed files; artifacts/pipeline/050 exists

residual_risk: real concurrent process execution relies on the documented thread safety of the std.process.Init arena/gpa/io; the determinism contract is independently enforced by the post-execution canonical sort
